description:
A plant manager needs an OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) dashboard based on production data located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\production_log.csv. Create a Power BI report that calculates the following measures:

- Availability_Pct: (Sum of Scheduled_Time_Min - Sum of Downtime_Min) / Sum of Scheduled_Time_Min
- Quality_Pct: (Sum of Total_Units - Sum of Scrap_Units) / Sum of Total_Units
- Performance_Pct: (Sum of Total_Units * (Average of Ideal_Cycle_Seconds / 60)) / (Sum of Scheduled_Time_Min - Sum of Downtime_Min)
- OEE_Score: Availability_Pct * Quality_Pct * Performance_Pct

The dashboard must include a Gauge Chart showing the OEE_Score with a target of 0.85, and a Matrix visual displaying Machine_ID as rows with the four calculated measures as values. Save the report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OEE_Dashboard.pbix and export the summary data from the Matrix visual to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\machine_oee_summary.csv.
